use_cases: Eye-catching hero section text for landing pages with continuous scrolling animation
Attention-grabbing call-to-action banner that follows cursor position
Visual brand statement display with interactive hover tooltips
ai_summary: An infinite text marquee component with cursor-reactive rotation and a following tooltip that appears on hover. Features smooth continuous scrolling animation powered by motion/react, with customizable text, speed, colors, and font size. Designed to create eye-catching visual impact on hero sections and landing pages.
